title: Brews and Bevs
description: Brews and Bevs is a lightweight mod that adds a unique brewing experience to your world!
body:
![Banner New](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc4a99248b4a802f3b025cd551a5861987d49954.png)

# Brews and Bevs (Fabric)

**Brews and Bevs** is a lightweight Minecraft mod that adds a unique brewing experience to your world! With this mod, you can craft a variety of beverages and enjoy custom potion effects by utilizing new items such as the Brewer, Cups, and Polished Wood.

## Features

- **The Brewer:**  
  The Brewer is a special brewing barrel where you can craft a range of beverages. Once placed, you can brew your favorite drinks in a rustic barrel-like fashion. Craft potent potions or just relax with a cold drink!

- **Cups:**  
  Crafted cups can be filled directly from the Brewer to hold different beverages. Each drink has unique potion effects, offering new strategies for survival and exploration. Take a sip to gain buffs, heal, or even more!

- **Hops & Grapes:**
  Hops and Grapes are a new crops in the game that is used for a lot of brewin recipes. You can find Hop plants in forest areas and you can find Grapes in savanna biomes.

- **Polished Wood:**  
  This polished variant of wood is a necessary crafting component for the Brewer. It adds an elegant aesthetic, and is crafted from regular wood, making it an essential material for your beverage operation.

- **Roughly Enough Items (REI) Compatibility:**  
  Easily discover all the crafting recipes and brewing options through REI integration. All beverage-related recipes will be visible and accessible from the REI interface, making your brewing experience even smoother.

## Crafting Recipes

- **Brewer:**  
  The Brewer is crafted using **Polished Wood** along with a few other standard materials. Once you have your polished wood, it's time to start brewing!

- **Cups:**  
  Cups are crafted from simple materials like glass, and can hold different beverages brewed in the Brewer. Collect various potions or drinks for different effects.

## Installation

1. Install [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/) and the [Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api) for Minecraft 1.20.1.
2. Download and add the `Beers and Bevs` mod file to your `mods` folder.

*OPTIONALLY* 

Install [Roughly Enough Items (REI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/roughly-enough-items) to access crafting recipes.

## Compatibility

- Fabric 1.20.1
- **REI Integration** included

## Planned Features

- More beverages with unique effects!
- Expanded barrel brewing mechanics
- Additional decorative wood variants and barrels

## Support

For bug reports or suggestions, please feel free to open an issue on our [GitHub page](https://github.com/yourmod/repo).

### Enjoy the mod? Feel free to leave feedback and suggestions!
